title: Rolson 12182 1.1/2 Lb Hand Axe Fibreglass Shaft
description: Product Description There once was a time where the axe was a must have tool to be proud of so you can carve, sculpt, chop and hack , however nowadays though the axe is almost forgotten at the bottom of the tool bag and only used when it’s dusted down after clearing out your garage to carry out one simple task.This axe is perfect for the DIY handyman, builders or tradesmen. A model tool for those who have a log fire in the home and need to gather and chop wood to survive the winter months, they will benefit from its handy size and its light weight, making the laborious task of chopping wood quicker and easier. This axe would also benefit the explorer and survivalists or even for the humble camper, it is ideal to help erect a campsite from gathering, cutting and shaping wood for the fire or to help with hunting, fishing and even food preparation.The Rolson 12182 hand axe has been manufactured with a forged head and a ground polished cutting edge, which will make chopping wood, feel like cutting through butter. Due to its light weight of just 2 pounds it’s easy to transport and carry around. The fibreglass handle with rubberized grip and sheath provides the user with a comfortable hold to be able to use this tool for hours without your hands or arms aching. Box Contains 1 x 1.5lb Fibreglass Hand Axe
